title: Silky Smoke Earth Yogurt Dip
description: A silky earthy yogurt dip infused with smoke and tailored for a date-night polished taste experience, vegan-friendly and paleo-approved.
instructions: Place the dried dates in a small bowl, add enough water to cover them completely. Let sit for about 20 minutes until soft.
In a blender, combine Greek yogurt, soaked and mashed dates, coconut flakes, chopped walnuts, ginger powder, and clove powder. Blend until smooth.
Season with salt to taste and mix well. Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or ramekin.
Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown on top and set in the middle. Let cool before serving.
Serve chilled as a dip with various vegetables.
